rulings.Case Title: JOSEPH BARIBEAU VS. HARRY C. THOMAS ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE ACTIONS OF CASE(S) CGC-17-561330 WITH CASE CGC-15-548463
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, January 26, 2018, Line 2. PLAINTIFF JOSEPH BARIBEAU'S MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE ACTIONS OF CASE(S) CGC-17-561330 WITH CASE CGC-15-548463. GRANTED. Parties are ordered to cooperate in good faith re: turning over all previously conducted discovery and obtaining additional discovery if necessary. =(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: JOSEPH BARIBEAU VS. HARRY C. THOMAS ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, January 26, 2018, Line 2. DEFENDANTS LAURA ROGERS, BROWN & CO. REAL ESTATE, INC.'S DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT. Sustained in part and overruled in part. Demurrer is sustained without leave to amend as to cause of action for negligent misrepresentation. Non-opposition filed. Demurrer is overruled as to causes of action for fraud and UCL violation. Doe amendment is proper and the filing of the First Amended Complaint relates back to October 15, 2015, which is within the applicable statute of limitations. Additionally, Defendants fail to cite any authority on point for the proposition that the UCL violation is governed by any statute of limitations other than 4-year statute of limitations provided in the statue itself. =(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: JOSEPH BARIBEAU VS. HARRY C. THOMAS ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, January 26, 2018, Line 2. DEFENDANTS LAURA ROGERS, BROWN & CO. REAL ESTATE, INC'S MOTION TO STRIKE 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT. DENIED. Doe amendment properly made based on the allegations in the complaint. Plaintiff sufficiently alleges ignorance of facts giving him a cause of action (each element) against the moving defendants. Whether or not these allegations are true may be addressed by Defendants at a later stage of this litigation. =(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: ERIC DRUMMOND VS. BROWNING PROPERTIES, LLC ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, January 26, 2018, Line 3. DEFENDANTS SURESH PATEL, 445 O'FARRELL STREET, LLC'S MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT. DENIED. Complaint sufficiently allegers facts to support request for punitive damages. =(501/REQ)
